cyan: noun. An additive secondary colour midway between green and blue, evoked by wavelengths between ~490 and ~520 nm.

mind: noun. The capability for rational thought.

mysid: noun. Any crustacean of the order Mysida.

say: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Saya.
scad: noun. Any of several fish, of the family Carangidae, from the western Atlantic.
scam: noun. A fraudulent or dishonest deal.
scan: verb. To examine sequentially, carefully, or critically; to scrutinize; to behold closely.
sic: symbol. Former ISO 639-3 language code for Malinguat.
syn: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Senaya.
sync: noun. Clipping of synchronization or synchrony.
